tools.name: research_copilot_status
tools.title: Research Copilot Status
tools.description: Report which research backends are reachable through Ploinky MCP from this agent.

tools.name: research_copilot_list_backends
tools.title: List Research Backends
tools.description: Return the static catalog of research backends owned by this repository and their default Ploinky agent ids.

tools.name: research_copilot_dispatch
tools.title: Plan Research Copilot Dispatch
tools.description: Build a WebChat launch URL for a research backend without executing it. Returns the path consumers should hand to the Ploinky router.
